title: Chinese Buddhist: Diamond Sutra (Kumarajiva translation) (4)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Diamond Sutra (Kumarajiva translation)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Diamond Sutra (Kumarajiva translation)

translation.text: From Diamond Sutra (Kumarajiva translation): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
